    iwn(4): Remove duplicate device entry

    'Intel Centrino Wireless-N 6250' is listed twice in the description
    section of the manual page.

    PR:     256257

    (cherry picked from commit 66e2a5803b0f80fff3bb8e3659ae7411ef94cc35)
